They hold it steadily with both hands and angle it slightly toward the camera, allowing the front details and surface texture to be clearly visible.

prompt3: The person holds a glass teapot with a removable stainless steel infuser basket and a heat-resistant borosilicate body in a final display at chest height, right hand supporting the top and left hand cupping the base.
